headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid PNC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, PNC Financial Services Group has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 19.7%. Its stock price has climbed to $228.02, representing a healthy 25.8% increase. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
